name: RFI-LOG
key_facts: RFI-001: Column spacing at Grid Line C-4 mismatch - Structural shows 24'-0", architectural shows 25'-0"
RFI-002: Mechanical room ceiling height 10 feet vs 12 feet minimum clear requirement
RFI-003: Window U-factor 0.30 in arch notes vs 0.28 required for code compliance
RFI-004: Fire damper locations not shown on mechanical drawings for shaft penetrations
RFI-005: Lobby floor finish - polished concrete vs terrazzo discrepancy
potential_conflicts: All RFIs represent active document contradictions that need resolution
